name: Barbee, Ruth
motto: Beauty, truth, and rarity, Grace in all simplicity.
clubs: President of Y. W. C. A., '23

name: Cooke, Leah
motto: Not too serious, not too gay, but altogether a jolly good fellow.

name: Felton, Annie Howard
motto: Most prudent, of an excellent and unmatched mind and judgment.
clubs: Undergraduate Representative of Y. W. C. A.

name: Lewis, Clara
motto: A smile for all, a greeting glad, A lovable, jolly way she had.
clubs: Vice-President of Y. W. C. A., '23-'24

name: Pope, Alice Lee
motto: And thou art worthy, full of power, gentle, liberal minded and consistent.

name: Whitehurst, Mary
motto: She smiles on all alike.

name: Cary, Augusta Woodward
motto: There is a kind of character in thy life, That to the observer doth thy history Fully unfold.

name: Anthony, Margaret
motto: She will dispute and prove it too, That blue is black and black is blue.
description: See that far away look in her eyes? Well, she is either thinking of New Bern or Florence, it is hard to tell which. She is one of us, however, and when there's anything doing you can always count on Margaret. She is always ready for any kind of mischief and a few other things shine out from her eyes. Good luck to you, Old Dear, and happy be your future.

name: Burns, Annie Cross
motto: Talking is more or less a consumption of energy.
description: Annie likes college life in general but home much better. She is one girl who glories in the right all women have-the right to speak her mind. We wish her success in her chosen career.

name: Burns, Grace
motto: Laugh and the world laughs with you.
description: Happy-go-lucky girl! Always laughing. When sad and blue go to her room and you'll laugh too. One might think her very dignified by only seeing her in the classroom but that is just the face she wears while obtaining knowledge. When she sees a piano she is always ready to play. What is it she cannot do? The Class of '24 wishes her much success in the future.

name: Atwater, Grace
motto: Who relished a joke and rejoiced in a bun, Rare compound of oddity, frolic and fun.
description: Grace is one of our most original girls. A merry companion, and a loyal friend. She is blessed with a happy nature and her dimples are constantly peeping out in her joyous smile. When we have the blues we run to Grace or "Dumps", for we've found that no one can scare them away as well as she can. We'll remember and love her always because-she's just Grace. To be a famous poet was Grace Atwater's aspiration, But a family with its attachment leaves no time for meditation.

name: Bailey, Lina
motto: What are little girls made of? Sugar and spice and everything nice.
description: This is certainly true in Lina's case. She is sweet and gentle, calm and deliberate about everything she undertakes. She worries and worries about her practice teaching, but we always find her coming out on top in the end, and we know she will succeed when she goes away. Loyal, dependable, studious-that's Lina. Little did I think that the girl called Lina Bailey, Would ever become so famous that we read about her daily.

name: Barnhardt, Sarah
motto: 'Tis the songs you sing and the smiles you wear That makes the sunshine everywhere.
description: This is truly fitting for Sarah, as she carries sunshine with her. She is happy and ready for mischief, which can be told by one glance of her eyes.

name: Barwick, Joanna
motto: Behind those brown eyes there lies much mischief.
description: Industrious and straightforward in every way is Joanna. She is true blue and we count it a privilege to have her as one of our pals. She is little but, you bet, she doesn't mind speaking what she thinks. Good luck to you, old girl.

name: Boswell, Bonnie
motto: As the spring's soft call brings forth the birdling's song, So doth her strains of sweet music make the heart rejoice.
description: "Bonn" is the musician of the class, and we are very proud of her talent. She plans to teach school, but sometimes we wonder! And we wonder if she really does not wonder about it herself at times! Why teach, when at any time she may possess a certain --------

name: Bateman, Gladys
motto: A smile for all, a greeting glad, An amiable, jolly way she had.
description: Gladys has been an invaluable asset to the college as well as to her class-being sent as a delegate to Blue Ridge from our Y. W. C. A., of which she is President, and having represented our student body at the Student Volunteer Convention held in Indianapolis. Broadmindedness and personality-supplemented by her extensive correspondence with "Carolina," "Wadesboro," and "Baltimore," makes her one of the most popular at E. C. T. C.

name: Bottoms, Bessie
motto: In she came with one most substantial smile.
description: "You can never tell what mischief is hiding behind those honest eyes, for she's always ready to laugh no matter how serious the occasion. However, she's a true friend, kind and sympathetic and makes life pleasant for those around her. With these qualities we are sure that Bessie will make a success. Betty Long and Bessie Bottoms who both were teachers rare, At present have a side show in the Greenville fair.

name: Boyette, Eula
motto: Under her crown of fair blonde hair, Many thoughts lie buried there.
description: Eula is quiet and studious, yet far from being dignified. Those who know her best find her a true friend at all times. She is a conscientious worker and tries to do her best in whatever she undertakes, both in her classwork and on the outside. She has made many friends at E. C. T. C., all of whom wish her much success.

name: Sudie Britt
motto: Smile and the world smiles with you.
description: Yes, this is Not so big nor so loud but very studious. She is quiet and unassuming, but liked by everyone who knows her.

name: Annie Laura Brown
motto: She is not afraid to say her say Though the world be against her.
description: When you hear Annie Laura say, "Well, girls, I do know," you may know she has something in store for you. She is one who is always ready with her winning smile to solve any problem that may confront her. With her modest, composed disposition, she has woven a chain of friendship which we hope will continue to link. We know that with her persistent determination she is bound to win.

name: Margaret Brown
motto: Not too serious, not too gay, But a good fellow, day by day.
description: Margaret is quiet, dignified, studious and ambitious; one whom you can depend on at all times. She is loved by her friends for her kind and gentle manners. Here's wishing her the best success.

name: Annie Lee Carter
motto: She can who thinks she can.
description: With the above motto we know Annie Lee will scale the ladder of success easily and smoothly. She is a girl who tries and conquers every problem that is put before her. We wish for her every success possible for we think nothing is too good for her.

name: Lillian Cockrell
motto: Those who laugh last, laugh best.
description: Remember this; and you'll think twice before you laugh. What would we have done if it hadn't been for Lillian's peals of laughter rippling through the air to cheer us on our way? She's a good sport, always ready for fun and frolic. Judging from her actions—for actions speak louder than words—we find "eat, dance and grow merry" to be her motto. Well, here's to you May you scale the ladder of success and upon reaching the top obtain your desired goal.

name: Barbara Conner
motto: Variety is the Spice of Life.
description: is full of surprises. One minute she is very angry and the next minute she is saying, "Look at the sweet letter I got today!" Though she has a "spit-fire" temperament, her friends know her for what she is—a true pal. She has strong likes and dislikes and will do any favor possible for those whom she likes. She is warm-hearted and loyal. A great success is predicted for her in the teaching profession.

name: Credle, Lucille
motto: To see her is to love her, To know her is to praise.
description: Although we did not have Lucille with us last year, we are very fortunate in having her now. She is a type of girl who makes friends with those about her and is fortunate enough to hold their friendship. She is jolly and full of life and will always be remembered as a jolly comrade.

name: Credle, Agnes
motto: She can who thinks she can.
description: Gentle, sweet and kind is Agnes; a friend to all. In her two years with us, she has won a place in everyone's heart. From the looks of her letters, we wonder if she will be a school "marm" long. Anyway - to you we wish and predict a great success.

name: Crew, Osceola Thomas
motto: And still the wonder grew, how one small head could carry all she knew.
description: Osceola has taken the honors of the college as the most studious girl. There is no need to repeat that the class accorded to her this honor, also. With an "I.Q." such as she has we can readily predict a very successful future for her. When on the spur of the moment, we desire and need some historical, mathematical or pedagogical lore, immediately and forthwith we rush to this classmate of ours. Most Studious.

name: Critcher, Aileen
motto: No sinner, nor saint perhaps. But well - the very best of chaps.
description: Well, we'll admit Aileen is no saint, and we can't say she is a sinner. She is the kind of a girl one loves to have around. She is thoughtful, cheerful and gay - always ready to help in any way. We're glad you are one of us, Aileen, and we wish much success for you.

name: Davenport, Millie
motto: Good nature and good sense must ever join.
description: A sweeter girl cannot be found. Although she seems quiet and reserved she is a good sport and always ready to help others. Millie stands high not only among her friends but in her class.

name: Downer, Irene
motto: I leave thy praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
description: Although we have never realized "Rene's" ambitions, yet we shall see them fulfilled. With her charming personality and her brilliant mind, she will not stop until she has reached the highest attainments.

name: Daniels, Pearle
motto: She may be serious, she may be gay, But she's a rare good sport in a rare good way.
description: What a number of good qualities we find in Pearle. She's the kind of a girl we all love—efficient in all things, a good sport, a real pal, a sweet disposition, unselfish and attractive. From all appearances we don't think Pearle will be in the teaching field long. Nevertheless, we predict for her great success in all she undertakes.

name: Dougherty, Janie
motto: Be good and always smile, Seems to be her motto, and It's well worth while.
description: Everybody likes Janie! With her kind and generous disposition she has won many friends to whom she is capable of being a genuine friend in return. She is always ready and willing to lend a helping hand to those about her. Her gentle, sincere manner will be sure to bring her many successes.

name: Dean, Annie Bell
motto: Be what you are and no other way.
description: "Cricket" is a modest, quiet girl who certainly lives up to the above motto. We all like her because of her thoughtfulness and unselfishness. She is a steady and earnest worker in everything she undertakes.

name: Farmer, Katie Lee
motto: I leave the praises unexpressed, I leave thy greatness to be guessed.
description: As a primary teacher, "Little Farmer" takes the lead. She is zealous in her work, thoughtful, loving and sympathetic with all her friends, a jolly good sport and ready for fun. This is "Little Farmer" and "Nunn" know her but to love her.

name: Dean, Bessie
motto: She's little and low, but never slow.
description: Bessie is a quiet, lovable girl and she is always ready when duty calls her. Yet when duty is done she is ready for play. She is a good friend to have and her classmates expect to hear of her as a successful teacher.

name: Freeman, Sallie Henry
motto: A very charming little girl.
description: Laughing from dawn to the set of sun, that's "Tillie." You never see her without a letter in her hand and—"Got a letter from Wake Forest." Here's to you "Tillie"—much success in your future life.

name: Fonville, Maude
motto: Quiet in nature, Jolly in play, Maude's a dear little girl in every way.
description: Though Maude's small in stature she has a big heart. She goes at her daily tasks in her quiet determined way which always wins. We wish for her great success in the future.

name: Gerald, Inez
motto: Always on time.
description: "Shortie" she is known as, not because of her height—but! She has a heart to conceive, an understanding to direct and a hand to execute. She is a good sport, especially in basketball.

name: Grier, Ellie
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: We find in Ellie a combination of love and friendship. She is a hard worker—but sometimes those blue eyes reveal some mischief, which is numbered as one of her characteristics. She is loyal to every organization here, and always thinks of others before she thinks of herself. We predict for Ellie a successful future in whatever she undertakes.

name: Grier, Mary Lou
motto: Interested and true, If she likes you, will stand by you.
description: Brilliant intellect, ready wit and energy combined—that's Mary Lou. She is on the Y. W. C. A. Cabinet and you can often hear, "Ask Mary Lou to do it. You can depend on her." She is always ready and willing to try any task set before her. We predict for her a great future.

name: Griffin, Wilma
motto: Every day in every way, She makes someone's life more gay.
description: The above fits Wilma exactly. It makes no difference how busy she is, we always go to Wilma when in need for she is so willing and capable to help us. We are looking forward to visiting "Bill" in her "little doll house" which we know she will soon be the mistress of, for it is her great desire to make someone happy, and we know she can do it.

name: Harris, Marie
motto: Success always comes to those who labor.
description: Labor might be called Marie's middle name. When duty calls, she is always on time with the "goods." It takes a person of this type to win out, and we are sure Marie will be a credit to E. C. T. C., in the future.

name: Hayes, Margaret Arthur
motto: Eyes that might see her on this summer day, Might find it hard to turn another way.
description: The word "sport" describes Margaret to a "t". When you meet her you may expect this greeting: "Ah! come on let's have a good time." Now doesn't that sound like Peggy!

name: Horton, Elsie
motto: Impulsive tho' her nature be She is quite true as you can see.
description: Elsie has an unusual gift—the ability to attract little children. There is no mystery about her power—she just loves them. She is a faithful and capable worker. With her persistent determination she will surely succeed in her chosen vocation.

name: Hines, Jessie
motto: Her happy disposition, her pleasant smile Have won her friends for many a mile.
description: Jessie is the jolliest, best-natured kind of a girl. She is always bright and happy, always willing to do something for some one else. For all these reasons, everyone who knows her loves her.

name: Hathaway, Agnes
motto: A noble and attractive every-day bearing comes of goodness, unselfishness, sincerity and refinement. These are the characteristics of Agnes.

name: Hart, Bertha
motto: Say what you have to say Be what you are and no other way.
description: Bertha is a wide awake, studious girl, liked by all. She loves mischief and plays many pranks on unsuspecting classmates. Bertha Hart would be a lawyer, but found the job too hard, And now she works in Bowen's selling cheese cloth by the yard.

name: Bernice, House
motto: Kind hearts are more than coronets.
description: Bernice is a quiet, studious, true and noble friend through all troubles. She is loved by all her friends for her kind and gentle manner, and she always has a smile for everybody. Here's wishing her the greatest success.

name: Doris, Jackson
motto: She is always quiet and dignified.
description: Although she has a quiet and dignified manner, she is always ready for fun. Doris is a very studious girl. She is always ready to help others.

name: Emma Lou, Jackson
motto: Laugh and the world laughs with you.
description: All who know Emma Lou know that she believes in this slogan for she has practiced the proverb "Laugh and grow fat". She is a fun loving girl, up for any sport. She is a conscientious worker and always goes prepared for her work. We expect great things from her if the "Chicks" will leave her alone.

name: Lorena, Jeannette
motto: When joy and duty clash, Let duty go to smash.
description: Yes, that's her sentiment exactly. Always out for fun—always ready for a laugh—but when Travis is mentioned she really and truly gets serious. In that big heart of hers you will find love, friendship and kindness. Although one of the prettiest girls in the class, she is not the least bit conceited. "Laugh and the world laughs with you, weep and you weep alone" is her motto. We know that she will meet with success wherever she goes, so here's luck to you, old girl. Best Sport.

name: Dorothy, Johnston
motto: Sweet, true and always kind, A better pal no one could find.
description: "Dot" is a living proof that a "teacher" may be gay and not noisy. She is happy and her sunny disposition shines over on rainy days to cheer us up when we have practice teaching and history reference reading. Her success seems inevitable if some "Perry" doesn't sidetrack her. A good sport in every way is what we find in her.

name: Pearl, Johnson
motto: Here is a dear, a true, and industrious friend
description: Pearl is one of our "fair damsels" from Johnston County. She is a very quiet and reserved girl and those of us who are lucky enough to know her say "to know Pearl is to love her." With her beauty and laughing care-free manner she steals hearts by the score. She is sincere, studious and stands well in her class.

name: Jordan, Grace
motto: If she will, she will, If she won't, she won't
description: This readily applies to Grace. Owner of her own heart, we think, and master of her own mind. What she says she means—whether in seriousness, sarcasm or jest. She's an all around good sport, ready for work and play. We expect great things from you, Grace, so don't disappoint us.

name: King, Lucy Gray
motto: She is candid and frank in every way.
description: One of Lucy's outstanding characteristics is lack of deceit. She is just what she is and a truer friend cannot be found. With her sunny disposition and wide store of knowledge, we predict for her great success as a "First Grade" teacher, or in anything that she may undertake.

name: Knott, Helen
motto: She wears a smile deep and wide, And bothers not with time or tide.
description: "Knott" is one of the sweetest and most popular members of our class. She is one we can always count on when we need help. "Knott" says she doesn't know what she particularly wants to do, but we feel sure "Our Blonde" just doesn't want to tell until—June. And Helen Knott, whom we all esteemed so high, Is now a crooked doctor, selling liquor on the fly.

name: Lanier, Lottie
motto: She is serious, sometimes gay, Yet she makes things go her way.
description: Lottie is a steady and earnest worker in everything she undertakes. Her actions are always from honest motives, and mindful of her fellow-man. We predict her success as a primary teacher.

name: Kellum, Sadie
motto: To be rather than to seem.
description: Here is a girl we know very little about. She is a quiet, dignified girl who takes more interest in her own affairs rather than the affairs of her neighbors. For this and her lovable disposition, she is loved and admired.

name: Kennedy, Inez
description: Put all the "write-ups" together and the result will be Inez. Look up in the dictionary the definition of a true-blue sport and apply it to her. It fits. When a game of basketball is played at E. C. T. C., select the best player. The result will be Inez.

name: Lazenby, Nell
motto: She's kind, she's modest, sincere and true. More studious, more generous than most of you.
description: You need go no further if it's for a real true pal you are searching. She is a sport through and through. With her lovable and generous disposition she has won many friends, to whom she is capable of being a genuine friend in return.

name: Leary, Lillian
motto: She is little in size, But so very good and wise.
description: She is a favorite among her classmates and this is readily seen by her many honors. Her singular manner and winning ways have won for her a place in all our hearts. If we are ever in need we know she is ready to lend a helping hand.

name: Lee, Susan E.
motto: For all she hath a kindly thought.
description: To like Susan you have to know her. Knowing her you will find her a valuable companion. She is always willing to solve any problem that may confront you, let it be a problem of love affairs or of school. She is never idle a moment but thrifty and thoughtful of others. If more information is desired see the "Black-haired Maroon and Gold." said Susan Lee one day, She has taken over her Daddy's store and tries to make it pay.

name: Leonard, Dayton
motto: Never busy but always accomplishing something.
description: That's Dayton, one of the most popular girls in the class. Take things as they come; do today what there is to do and let tomorrow take care of itself, is another one of Dayton's philosophies. She loves a good time and she usually has it but she doesn't let good times come ahead of her work. She's a good sport and a true friend and we're expecting a splendid career for you, Dayton, so don't disappoint us.

name: Little, Annie
motto: Not for herself alone.
description: This has long since been Annie's motto, and she lives up to it in every sense of the word. For two years she served her class as Student Government Representative, and she gave of her best. No matter how difficult the task she always meets it with a smile. With her ability, her noble character and charming personality, we feel sure that only success awaits her. In college Annie Little as a student made her mark, Behold her now a peddler selling popcorn in the park.

name: Long, Betty
motto: Life is full of laughter But even laughter ends. Give me instead forever, The friendship of my friends.
description: Betty is just an "all around" girl whom we all love. She possesses that quality of being the same wherever you see her; this wins for her quick and lasting friends. Betty is always ready for play when her duties are done. She's a friend worth having. Betty Long and Bessie Bottoms who both were teachers rare, At present have a side show in the Greenville fair.

name: Lois, Lynch
motto: Not too quiet, not too gay, but loyal and true in every way.
description: Lois is known among us as one who goes about minding her own business and doing her duty. She has a high sense of humor, is a good sport and proves a good friend to those in trouble. May all happiness in life be hers.

name: Clara, T. Lynn
motto: If you want a friend that's sweet and true, one who writes poetry and loves it too, and one who still loves you tho' others fail, then Clara is the girl for you.
description: Tho' "Smiles" has red hair she doesn't possess the "red hair" characteristics. Instead she's jolly, happy and always smiling. That's why we call her Smiles. She slips herself into people's hearts and then—we wonder how we got along without her. Because we love her we hope her dreams come true, which means "that home with the hillside sloping down to the lake" will bye and bye come true.

name: Lillian, McArthur
motto: Gamma-Gamma-Rho tell 'em 'cause I-I-I-I-I-I-stutter.
description: Lil, even tho' she keeps you listening for the next word, is a girl everyone likes. She is capable of doing well any task she undertakes. We hope Lil will continue to sing her merry songs and quote poetry in the future, along with her witty sayings. Lil is always happy and brings cheer to her friends.

name: Nettie, McCanless
motto: Her cheeks were rosy, her lips were red, bought and paid for so they said.
description: Did you ever see a brunette that wasn't up to some mischief? Well, if you haven't, just hang around and watch "Peanut" awhile, mischief is her main line of business, except when she is writing to _? Nevertheless, with all her mischief and fun, "Peanut" doesn't hesitate to study once in a while. For this little ray of sunshine we predict a successful future.

name: Lucia Mae, McCallum
motto: Ye shall know her by her smile.
description: She is a quiet, dignified girl and possesses a store of knowledge. She isn't a "chatter-box" but when she speaks it is worth your while to listen. Lucia Mae is always willing to help others. She never says "I can't" but with one of her winning smiles (which she always wears) she always does her best. To know Lucia Mae is to love her.

name: Flora, McCormack
motto: Precious things are done up in small packages.
description: It can truly be said of Flora that a "friend in need is a friend indeed." You can take any of your troubles, with the exception of arithmetic, to her, and she will help you willingly. She is a loyal member of the "Rowland Gang" and especially true to her chewing gum. Flora is a good sport, dependable, ambitious, frank in her opinions and success awaits her in everything she may undertake.

name: McCormack, Ora
motto: Good nature and good sense must ever join.
description: Here is the greatest combination of brains and personality found anywhere. To have Ora for a friend is to have one that is loyal and true. In school she is an excellent student and out of school she is a good sport in every way. She is absolutely true blue and we count it a privilege to know her.

name: Mc Lawhorn, Dora
motto: Work before play, then the pleasure is real.
description: To appreciate her you must know her well. She works untiringly, always letting work come before pleasure, but in the end she reaps her just reward. Although seemingly reserved, she has a real sweet disposition and, yes, a sense of humor. When in need, you may depend on her for a helping hand.

name: McCormack, Willie
motto: Not too serious, not too gay, but a good pal, day by day.
description: Fate always sends "Bill" where someone needs a cheerful word. If you are down-hearted and blue and "Bill" is around, your face will soon be in a smile by hearing "Bill" say, "Listen girls, I know a new joke," and finally wind up by saying, "Children, don't you think I'm falling off." We expect great things from you, "Bill."

name: McFayden, Annie
motto: 'Tis Annie McFayden, our own 'Sunny Mock', she wins many friends with her smiles and her tact.
description: "Sunny Mack" is one of our girls who is blessed with a jolly good nature. Nothing is too hard for her to tackle with a will that wins. At early sunrise you can often see Annie B. with a smiling face enjoying a morning sport on the tennis court.

name: Mitchell, Lila
motto: Rich are they who have many true friends.
description: Always a smile and a cheerful word from Lila. She has greatly endeared herself to her friends and classmates. No situation is too trying for her optimism. Always she is calm, serene, dignified, courteous and generous. She is very studious and at her post of duty on time, and at all times complying with the Student Government regulations. To know her is to love her.

name: Mitchell, Marie
motto: A willing worker, full of mirth, We need more like her on this earth.
description: Marie has an intelligence intensely alive—she has determination, endurance and a keen sense of humor. We feel sure that since it is her delightful task to rear the under thoughts, to develop the young mind, she will win her way to the hearts of all her pupils.

name: Mitchell, Ruth
motto: Still water runs deep.
description: Along with several others from our class, Ruth comes from the western part of "the grand old North State." Judging from the I. Q. she has, we know what is in store for her. Our greatest cry is, "More girls like Ruth for E. C. T. C."

name: Modlin, Helen
motto: She is ever a good sport and a true friend, And one upon whom we may safely depend.
description: Helen is just what everybody likes—a jolly good sport, kind, amiable, unselfish and attractive. She is always thoughtful of others and a faithful and capable worker. We all wish for her the success that seems inevitable. Helen Modlin kept this end in view, to be a millionaire, A teacher's job looked good to her and so she landed there.

name: Morgan, Annie Lee
motto: Have more than thou showest, Speak more than thou knowest.
description: Annie Lee always meets her tasks with a sincere heart and never gives up until she has overcome it. A successful teacher is our wish for her.

name: Morris, Elizabeth
motto: For every funny cry or yell We go to 'Tissie' who knows them well. When it comes to looks, Elizabeth's there, She makes you want to tear your hair, She loves to smile and wink her eye, And makes the jealous nearly die.

name: Murden, Margaret
motto: A sunny disposition is half the battle.
description: Margaret is quiet and faithful to a degree that commands admiration from her classmates; a good, lovable girl, with a keen sense of humor. She is an earnest student and we feel sure the way to success is open to her.

name: Garnette, Myers
motto: "What's the use of worrying, It never was worth while, So pack up your troubles And smile, smile, smile."
description: Bubbling over with laughter, that's "Peggy." It is spontaneous, it is irresistible, that jolly laugh of hers, and the way her blue eyes twinkle testify that it is natural. Her sayings and gestures are just "heaps" of fun to her friends. The two things she likes best are: dancing and playing the ukulele. Mingled with her jolly disposition she is studious, for she makes excellent grades in all her studies.

name: Nellie, Pearce
motto: "Sweet music breathes her soul away."
description: This quiet girl doesn't stand out as a star performer in any particular branch of work, but she is a steady and earnest worker in everything she undertakes. We realize her capabilities and predict her success in the world.

name: Maye, Pendergraph
motto: "I could not in a palace find, A truer heart than she."
description: Maye is never sad or mad. Her whole aim in life is to make others glad. Here's to you, Maye, may the sunshine of your smile pierce through the dark clouds and bring happiness to all.

name: Marian, Newby
motto: "Blessed are they who have the gift of making friends, for it is one of God's best gifts. It involves many things, but, above all, the power of going out of one's self, and appreciating whatever is noble and loving in another."
description: Best All-round

name: Bertha, Peterson
motto: "Although she is small, and hardly grew at all, If she were not on the list, she would be sadly missed."
description: Bertha is a sensible, attractive girl and you who are numbered among her friends may be called fortunate. She believes in studying, but "When pleasure and studying clash, let studying go to smash." However, when Bertha sees a thing must be done, she is a girl who can and will do it.

name: Perry, Clara
description: The Tecoan

name: Robinson, Roslind
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: Rosalind does what she thinks best, and is seldom wrong in it. She is quiet, dignified and faithful. A good, lovable girl whose high sense of humor exceeds the average. She is jolly, good natured and true.

name: Shelton, Mary Gold
motto: She is bright, she is witty, she is kind, it's true, We wouldn't swap her for fifty like you.
description: Mary Gold is one of our typical E. C. T. C. girls. If you want anything done, and done well, go to her. She has never been found shirking her work—especially English. Her winning smiles and laughing eyes speak well for her. Her heart is kind and sympathetic, and she will always be remembered by those who know her.

name: Shelton, Mamie Dorothy
motto: Her winning ways and sunny smiles, Make her friendship well worth while.
description: That Mamie has many friends at E. C. T. C. cannot be disputed, for to know her is to love her. When pleasure presents itself she is a right good sport and is always willing to take her part.

name: Roberson, Katie Mae
motto: I chatter, chatter all day long.
description: Katie Mae does not abide by the old saying, "Children should be seen and not heard." She's always both seen and heard. She is cheerful, vivacious and gay, but she can appear rather serious sometimes—when she is warning some girl of the Council. However, she can "get by" the Council with what she wants to do, and never seems to stop and warn herself. MOST TALKATIVE

name: Rogers, Sindie
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: Siddie is a girl of a very rare kind, With the mildest manners and the bravest mind. She's always ready for pleasure and fun, When duty and work are done. With her winsome ways and cheery smile, She's a "friend of friends" very worth while. To the future we extend, Success for her that will never end.

name: Sledge, Gladys
motto: Best things come in smallest packages.
description: Here is a girl whom everyone may depend upon doing the right thing. She possesses a wonderful personality which leads you to love her, for by her winning ways she has won a place in the heart of everyone who knows her.

name: Snowden, Marjorie Bell
motto: She may be serious and she may be gay, But she's a rare good pal in a rare good way.
description: To like "Margie" you have to know her. She is a good sport in every way and always ready to have fun. Although "Margie" likes fun, her work comes first. Every Monday morning you can hear her say, "See you in a minute, I have to see Miss Graham." She is industrious and straight-forward in every way.

name: Smith, Lois
motto: Quote Judith, "What's in a name." In faith, we would ask you the same; For this bright Smith imp Is aught but a simp. That's a rhyme which was really our aim.
description: Being very accommodating and always ready to help a friend in need, many a girl has sought Lois in solving the seemingly impossible math problems. She shines in many other phases of life, especially history, she being much interested in two of our presidents, John "Quincy" Adams and "Wilson." She is the kind of a girl we will remember as a good comrade and true friend. Lois Smith's only ambition was to become somebody's wife, She discovered a cure for kinky hair and now is fixed for life.

name: Stanley, Elizabeth
motto: As busy as a bee.
description: Always ready to go somewhere for a big time—that's "Lib." This does not mean that she never studies for her classmates know better. As for teaching, she is considered a very polite teacher. When a child accidentally answers correctly Elizabeth is so shocked she can only think of "Thank you." We know she will make an excellent primary teacher for she knows just how to handle the little ones.

name: Smith, Sarah
motto: Tiny parcels are the best.
description: There is a ray of sunshine to be found in the darkest places when Sarah is around. She has the "gift of gab" along with a history brain. As for her eyes, look at them and draw your own conclusions.

name: Sylvant, Myrtle
motto: No jokes or pranks you ever play, And you never throw your time away.
description: Myrtle has manner demure, But once she thinks you've done her wrong, Down sweeps her vengeance on the person's head. And before she's avenged he will wish he were dead.

name: Taylor, Nettie
motto: "When I ope my mouth to speak, Let no dog bark."
description: Who can describe Nettie? She is here and there brightening our lives with her ever ready wit, her laughter and sunny disposition. Her classmates, and all who know her, love her and like to have her around—"to chase away the blues." A magnetic and charming personage is Nettie, and we are expecting great things of her in the teaching world if the "Bills" are not too many.

name: Tyson, Mary
motto: "A friend that is loyal and true."
description: Mary is the most confidential girl on the hill, as true as steel. A friend in need is a friend indeed. You will always find Mary the truest of friends. She is little 'tis true but her heart is as big as two.

name: Viniarski, Helen Theresa
motto: "Trust a man? I'd trust the devil first."
description: "Moonshine" has been a faithful member of the Class of '24, always willing to do what is asked of her. This is shown by her being our representative on the Annual Staff for two years. Along with her work she carries the motto, "Have a good time." Her tongue's always ready with sarcasm and fun. Here's wishing you much success when you receive your M.R.S. degree.

name: Tucker, Felsie
motto: "Though small of stature, large of brain, From no hard task does she refrain, As true as gold, bright as the sun, In triumph she, life's race will run."
description: This almost expresses Felsie's real nature. She is a friend to all with whom she comes in contact. She is a broad visioned girl who knows a square deal always. NEATEST. To what end did Felsie Tucker exercise her charm and grace? She is now a Chorus Girl in some small town place.

name: Waters, Sallie
motto: Think of me as you please.
description: Sallie is the kind of a girl you like when you know her. She is a true and jolly good sport on all occasions. Throughout her college years she has been a valuable asset to her society. She expects to teach school, but judging from her "specials" which appear so frequently, we do not predict for her a long career as a school ma'am.

name: Watson, Mabel
motto: Small in stature but not in 'pep'.
description: "I ain't telling you no story." When you hear these words you may know Mabel is coming to relate one of her exciting experiences. The fact that she has been voted cutest for two years speaks much for her. Give Mabel a good book and a box of candy for company and she is in paradise. She is very fond of eating and dancing, therefore, her motto, "To eat and to dance." CUTEST

name: Westbrook, Bertha
motto: Be modest, be kind, be true, Each intent will be accomplished if you do. Run to the goal of success. 'Twill only be there that Bert can rest.
description: "Bert" is a grand "Ole Lady" (room mate). Who knows better than I? Why we go to bed singing and get up singing. "Bert" does her work too. She is always ready. When the question is asked her answer is "I will." We all know what a variety of ideas are stored away in her head by her most entertaining programs, which are given on Saturday nights at monthly business meetings of the Y. W. C. A.

name: Wester, Grace
motto: But while I breathe heaven's air, and heaven looks down on me and smiles at my best meanings, I remain mistress of mine own self and mine own soul.
description: When you really know her, you find how much you have been missing—a friend of sterling qualities. In the social firmament Grace twinkles as one of the brightest stars. With her cheerful smile she has become a favorite with the "Cricket on the Hearth." We feel sure success and happiness will be her lot in the world.

name: West, Margaret
motto: Talking, she knew not what and cared not why.
description: "Hix" is just an all round girl and possesses that quality of having the same sweet disposition wherever you see her. She is one of those folks who forget to make you feel blue. She is a happy-go-lucky girl whom everyone likes and likes to be thrown with.

name: Whichard, Eva
motto: Always be on top.
description: This quiet and dignified girl lives up to her motto—always prepared to do her task and do it well. With her persistent determination she is bound to win. Those who claim her friendship are fortunate indeed.

name: White, Charlotte
motto: Nothing more useful than silence.
description: Charlotte comes to us from N. C. C. W. She is quiet, modest and capable. Day by day she constantly keeps increasing her knowledge of things in general. Charlotte may be sure when she leaves E. C. T. C., she carries along with her the best wishes of her classmates for a successful future.

name: Wilkins, Blanche
motto: To be loved is all I need, And whom I love, I love indeed.
description: Here, indeed, is a woman with a head to contrive, a tongue to persuade and a hand to execute any action with merit. This has been clearly shown in the numerous things Blanche has done for her class as its president. But don't take her too seriously, for with her jolly disposition she often converts her room into a veritable "Laughinghouse." Her classmates wish for her the success which seems inevitable.

name: Winfree, Fannie
motto: On time every time.
description: Fannie not only lives up to this motto, but tries to encourage others to do the same. She believes that duty comes before pleasure, and always uses her time to the best advantage. In spite of this when the time comes for pleasure, a more good-natured, fun-loving girl cannot be found anywhere. One cannot help but love her because of her unselfish spirit and willingness to help others.

name: Withers, Nancy
motto: Thy modesty is a candle to the merit.
description: Modest and refined is she, yet she is one of those rare girls who possesses power to make a success of whatever she undertakes. We predict for Nancy a most successful future.

name: Woods, Margaret
motto: 'Tis reported that Dan Cupid's dart, Has punctured this fair damsel's heart, But when we ask 'Maggie' She says 'Look at my Frat.' Now what do you think is the meaning of that?
description: Margaret is one of our sweetest girls. She wins her way into your heart before you know it, and you love her because—well, you just can't help it. We wish for her great success in the future and happiness in her work, though she teach but one in a Bungalow School.

name: Yelverton, Elva
motto: To know her is to love her.
description: Elva is an inspiration to those with whom she comes in contact—calm, serene and dignified, but she has her gay side too. Elva is "strickly" a good sport if she does call him her Buddy.

name: Bryan, Annie
motto: A perfect woman, noble planned, To warn, to comfort and command.
description: We would have to travel to find a sweeter and nobler girl than Annie. She is always ready with a cheerful word to help those about her. Her friends look forward with pleasure to her friendly smile of greeting. We are sure her kind and noble manner will bring her many successes in whatever she undertakes.

name: Gardner, Minnie
motto: A silent girl is always more admired than a noisy one.
description: Minnie is a girl with a strong will and a true heart. She is one whom we all admire. She will surely reach her goal in all things she begins.

name: Braswell, Irene
motto: Irene is wise, She is betrayed by her looks, She's fairly in love, With papers and books.
description: Irene has many, so many good traits that it would take ages to write them all. However, when they are added up, our Irene can't be beat. She is a girl worth knowing and having as a friend.

name: Braswell, Mary
motto: If ever she knew an evil thought, She spoke no evil word.
description: What has been said of Irene is also true of Mary. With her winning ways we are sure that the world holds much in store for her.

name: Mannis, Bertie
motto: A woman of wit and merry sayings.
description: Bertie is a girl loved for quietness and dignity. She is always ready to help her fellow students when they are in need. Good luck! to you, old girl, and may success be ever thine.

name: Helms, Mary
motto: A scholar who silently thinks and thinks, And eventually unravels all the kinks.
description: Here's a girl who knows how to cook, To knit and crochet, This is quite enough for any girl's hook, And she'll get a man some day.

name: Purser, Faye
motto: Smile, and the world smiles with you.

name: Hockaday, Eva L.
motto: Still waters run deep.
